# TheBrandle — Full Project Handoff
**Date:** May 17, 2026 | **Owner:** Muteeb (muteebmehraj@gmail.com)

---

## Who Is Muteeb

Solopreneur with 6+ years experience in design, branding, UI/UX, and web development. His studio is **TheBrandle** (thebrandle.com). He works across Framer, Webflow, WordPress, Wix, and custom HTML. Services include branding, UI/UX, landing pages, one-page websites, app design, motion design, and videography.

---

## Project Overview

**thebrandle.com** is a Framer-exported static website deployed on Vercel. The frontend is generated by Framer and should not be hand-written. The only custom backend code is the contact form API (`api/contact.js`). Full technical context lives in `CLAUDE.md` at the project root.

**Stack:**
- Frontend: Framer-exported static HTML/JS (React 18, Framer Motion)
- Backend: Vercel serverless functions in `/api/` (Node.js CommonJS)
- Email: Resend SDK v3
- Deployment: Vercel
- Domain: thebrandle.com

**Environment variables on Vercel:**
| Variable | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | Contact form — sends email via Resend |
| `CAL_API_KEY` | Cal.com slots proxy API |

---

## What Was Built This Session

### 1. Floating Cal.com Booking CTA ✅ (Working)

An Apple-style floating pill button that appears on every page of the site. It shows live slot availability from Cal.com and opens a Cal.com booking overlay on click.

**How it works:**
- Visitor clicks pill → Cal.com modal opens → picks a slot → Google Meet link auto-generated → both get a calendar invite
- The pill shows "Next slot: Today at 3pm" (or similar) by fetching live availability via a server-side proxy

**Files created/modified:**

`api/cal-slots.js` — New Vercel serverless function. Proxies requests to Cal.com's v2 API (`/v2/slots`) using the `CAL_API_KEY` env var. Mirrors the pattern of `api/contact.js`. Returns slot data with 60s cache headers.

`vercel.json` — Added `/api/cal-slots` rewrite route alongside the existing `/api/contact` route.

`thebrandle.framer.website/index.html` — Injected just before `</body>`:
- Full CSS for the pill button (Apple-style dark pill, red dot with breathing animation, shimmer effect, arrow)
- The HTML button element
- A script block that: loads Cal.com embed from CDN, wires the button click to open the Cal modal, and fetches the next available slot to display in the sub-label

**Cal.com config (inside index.html ~line 87748):**
```js
var CAL_USERNAME   = 'thebrandle';
var CAL_EVENT_SLUG = '15min';
var TIMEZONE       = 'Asia/Dubai';
```

**Cal.com setup (done by user):**
- Event type: 15-min Quick Call, slug `15min`
- Location: Google Meet
- Availability: Mon–Thu, 10am–6pm Dubai time
- Buffer: 10 min after each call
- Intake question: "What would you like to discuss?"
- Email confirmation + 1hr reminder enabled

---

### 2. SEO Foundations ✅

The site had several critical SEO blockers. All were fixed directly in the codebase.

**Problems that existed before this session:**
- Canonical URL was broken — pointing to `/thebrandle.framer.website/` (Framer staging domain) instead of `https://thebrandle.com/`. Google may have been indexing the wrong domain.
- No `sitemap.xml` existed at all
- No `robots.txt` existed at all
- Title tag had no target keywords
- Meta description had no service-specific keywords
- No schema markup of any kind
- OG/Twitter tags not keyword-optimised

**Files created/modified:**

`thebrandle.framer.website/sitemap.xml` — Created. Lists homepage, /projects, /services, /contact with priorities and change frequencies. Served at `/sitemap.xml` via Vercel rewrite.

`robots.txt` — Created at project root. Allows all crawlers, references sitemap URL.

`vercel.json` — Added routes for `/sitemap.xml` and `/robots.txt` in addition to `/api/cal-slots`.

`thebrandle.framer.website/index.html` — Updated:
- `<title>` → "TheBrandle | Branding, UI/UX & Web Design Studio — Framer, Webflow & App Design"
- `<meta name="description">` (and og/twitter equivalents) → keyword-rich description covering all services
- `<link rel="canonical">` → fixed to `https://thebrandle.com/`
- `og:url` → fixed to `https://thebrandle.com/`
- Added `<link rel="sitemap" href="/sitemap.xml">`
- Added `ProfessionalService` JSON-LD schema markup listing all service types (branding, UI/UX, Framer, Webflow, WordPress, Wix, landing pages, app design, motion design)

**Full SEO strategy** is in: `thebrandle-seo-strategy.md` (25 target keywords, on-page audit, content gap analysis, competitor comparison, backlink strategy, monthly execution timeline)

---

### Highest Priority SEO Task
**Build service sub-pages in Framer.** The site is currently a single-page SPA — Google only sees one URL. Every competitor ranks because they have dedicated pages per service. These need to be built inside Framer, exported, and deployed:

| Page | Primary Keywords |
|------|----------------|
| `/services/framer-design` | Framer design agency, Framer developer for hire |
| `/services/webflow-design` | Webflow design agency, Webflow developer for hire |
| `/services/branding` | branding studio for startups, brand identity designer |
| `/services/landing-pages` | landing page design service |
| `/services/ui-ux-design` | UI UX design studio |
| `/services/one-page-websites` | one-page website design |
| `/services/app-design` | app design studio |
| `/services/motion-design` | motion design agency |
| `/services/html-websites` | HTML website design service |
| `/services/wordpress` | WordPress website design service |
| `/services/videography` | videography for brands |
| `/services/wix-design` | Wix website designer |

After pages are built: update `sitemap.xml` to include all new URLs.

## Important Architecture Notes

- **Never hand-edit Framer component files** — files in `framerusercontent.com/` are auto-generated. Exception: the bundled form component `.mjs` has been manually patched in prior commits.
- **Re-exporting from Framer will overwrite `index.html`** — all manual patches (Cal.com CTA, SEO meta tags, schema markup, canonical fix) will need to be re-applied after any Framer re-export.
- **Vercel routing:** specific routes (`/api/contact`, `/api/cal-slots`, `/sitemap.xml`, `/robots.txt`) must come before the catch-all `"/(.*)"` rewrite in `vercel.json` or they won't be reached.
- **Resend SDK v3** uses `{ data, error }` return pattern — it does NOT throw on failure. Check `result.error` explicitly.
- **Cal.com embed** is loaded via CDN script from `app.cal.com/embed/embed.js` — no npm package needed on the frontend side.
